title: 12Pcs Marvel Spider-Man Colouring Set for Kids – 8 Colouring Sheets, 6 Colour Pencils & Stickers – Official Spidey Art Kit – Travel Activity Pack – Superhero Gifts for Boys & Girls Ages 3+
features: Official Marvel Spider-Man Design: Bring the world of Spider-Man to life with this officially licensed colouring set. Features bold character art from the Marvel Universe that kids will love!
Complete Creative Pack: Includes 8 colouring pages, 6 coloured pencils, and a sheet of fun Spider-Man stickers – everything children need for mess-free, screen-free fun.
Ideal for Travel or On-the-Go Play: Compact, lightweight and easy to pack – this set is perfect for travel, school holidays, or rainy day entertainment. Size 29cm x 21cm.
Perfect Superhero Gift for Kids 3+: Great for party favours, birthday gifts, Christmas stockings, and creative time. Designed for both boys and girls who love Spider-Man toys and Marvel characters.
Safe & Child-Friendly Materials: All materials are non-toxic and child-safe, ideal for little artists aged 3+. Encourages creativity, focus, and fine motor skill development.
description: Swing into creativity with the Marvel Spider-Man Colouring Set! Perfect for young superheroes, this official Marvel kit includes everything kids need for a fun and imaginative art session – 8 detailed colouring sheets, 6 safe and vibrant pencils, and a sheet of reusable stickers. Whether you're planning a road trip, filling a party bag, or looking for a great Spider-Man gift, this compact and colourful set is a top pick. Watch as your child brings their favourite Marvel characters to life through colouring and sticker play! Features 6 Colouring Sheets – Bold black-and-white Spider-Man designs for kids to colour. 6 Colouring Pencils – Pre-sharpened and safe for young hands. 1 Sticker Sheet – Featuring reusable Spidey stickers. Portable Design – Flat-packed, lightweight and ideal for travel or gifting. Official Licensed Product – Marvel & Spider-Man Specifications Recommended Age: 3 years and up Contents: 8 Colouring Sheets, 6 Colouring Pencils, 1 Sticker Sheet Material: Paper, Wood, Non-toxic colouring materials Packaging Type: Flat-packed, blister or carded set Dimensions (Approx): 29cm x 21cm (A4 size) Gender: Unisex – Suitable for boys and girls Theme: Marvel Superheroes / Spider-Man SATISFACTION GUARANTEED Your satisfaction is our first priority, customer service always stands by for you to provide 100% satisfied service. If you are not happy with this product for any reason feel free to contact us.
